threat_or_abuse_case: malformed decompression-bomb or oversized image exhausts resources or exploits parser
potential_impact: availability compromise or code execution with clinical delay
required_controls: pre-parser body cap file/pixel limits patched decoder isolation gateway rate/concurrency/time limits
verification: negative corpus fuzz DAST load and container tests

threat_or_abuse_case: stolen service token or spoofed actor header invokes analysis
potential_impact: unauthorized access privacy breach or false attribution
required_controls: MFA RBAC site scope stripped headers gateway-only rotating credential named audit

threat_or_abuse_case: checkpoint substitution rollback or unsafe deserialization
potential_impact: arbitrary code or invalid clinical output
required_controls: weights-only schema exact digest read-only mount signed release rollback prevention

threat_or_abuse_case: malicious or vulnerable package action image or build
required_controls: hash locks immutable digests SBOM SAST SCA container scan signed provenance supplier review
verification: clean CI independent scan and signature verification

threat_or_abuse_case: record edit deletion truncation fork or clock manipulation
potential_impact: loss of traceability and incident evidence
required_controls: hash chain sequence process lock persistent head external immutable export restricted storage trusted time
verification: tamper concurrency gap alert restore and site tests

threat_or_abuse_case: traffic interception replay CSRF/CORS misuse or unrestricted egress
potential_impact: data disclosure request manipulation or exfiltration
required_controls: TLS gateway exact origin service auth replay-safe workflow network segmentation deny egress

threat_or_abuse_case: PHI or secret enters report telemetry support bundle or backup
required_controls: data minimization pseudonymous case IDs redaction no pixels/secret logs encryption retention review
verification: log inspection DLP review restore/deletion test

threat_or_abuse_case: ransomware resource exhaustion power or supplier outage delays workflow
potential_impact: clinical delay or loss of records
required_controls: capacity limits monitoring downtime procedure backups HA where justified signed rebuild disaster recovery
verification: load soak fault injection restore and DR exercise

threat_or_abuse_case: excess privilege shared accounts stale access or malicious insider
required_controls: named accounts MFA least privilege dual control quarterly review immediate revoke immutable admin logs

threat_or_abuse_case: unsupported scanner stain tissue or adversarial artifact produces plausible wrong output
required_controls: validated input envelope OOD/quality rejection labeling source overlay human review drift monitoring
verification: robustness external clinical and human-factors validation

threat_or_abuse_case: unauthorized or failed update creates mixed versions or removes rollback
required_controls: signed immutable artifacts staged deployment atomic install compatibility check rollback and inventory
verification: IQ OQ rollback and mixed-version tests

threat_or_abuse_case: unauthorized export subject-right action or cross-border transfer
potential_impact: data disclosure record corruption or unlawful processing
required_controls: approved data flow contracts role checks export logging rights workflow legal hold and transfer controls
verification: DPIA privacy audit and site acceptance
